title: QuickNode API credentials should not be disclosed
description: QuickNode provides blockchain node infrastructure for Ethereum, Solana, Bitcoin, and 20+ other chains. API endpoints contain authentication tokens. Exposing these allows unauthorized blockchain RPC calls at your expense and potential abuse of node infrastructure.
recommendation: Remove QuickNode endpoint URLs and API keys from source code. Store in environment variables. Rotate at dashboard.quicknode.com.
impact: Unauthorized blockchain RPC usage at your expense, potential rate limit abuse, and access to blockchain data queries.

checks.message: QuickNode RPC endpoint URL detected. QuickNode endpoint URLs contain embedded authentication tokens that authorize blockchain RPC calls. Exposing these URLs allows unlimited blockchain node usage billed to your account, querying any blockchain data available through the endpoint, submitting transactions to the network, and potentially exhausting your request limits. Rotate the endpoint immediately at dashboard.quicknode.com.
QuickNode API key detected in variable assignment. QuickNode API keys authenticate blockchain node RPC requests. Rotate at dashboard.quicknode.com.
